channel.title: 2026-04-19 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-04-19 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: [ASAP] How to Use Quantum Computers for Biomolecular Free Energies
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Jakob Günther, Thomas Weymuth, Moritz Bensberg, Freek Witteveen, Matthew S. Teynor, F. Emil Thomasen, Valentina Sora, William Bro-Jørgensen, Raphael T. Husistein, Mihael Erakovic, Marek Miller, Leah Weisburn, Minsik Cho, Marco Eckhoff, Aram W. Harrow, Anders Krogh, Troy Van Voorhis, Kresten Lindorff-Larsen, Gemma Solomon, Markus Reiher, and Matthias Christandl
Journal of Chemical Theory and Computation DOI: 10.1021/acs.jctc.5c02088
